title: How to Turn off Email Auto Response When On Vacation or Out of office
excerpt: I am on vacation. My autoresponder is on in my email at work. Every time I am tagged on something, it goes to my email and my autoresponse replys that I am out of town. ON EVERYTHING FOR TEN DAYS! My team is sooooo annno…

posts.author: MelissaFox (Melissa Fox )
posts.cookedHtml:
I am on vacation. My autoresponder is on in my email at work. Every time I am tagged on something, it goes to my email and my autoresponse replys that I am out of town. ON EVERYTHING FOR TEN DAYS! My team is sooooo annnoyyyeed.

How do I turn this off while I am out?

Melissa

posts.author: Qassam-monday.com (Qassam Atme)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaFox

You can turn off your email notification from you Profile

Click on your profile picture -> My profile -> Notifications

Then uncheck all the email notification checkboxes:

Cheers!

posts.author: MelissaFox (Melissa Fox )
posts.cookedHtml: Just saw that you guys added the DND button!!! Thank you - it is so useful to our team.
